cta_pattern.hypothesis: Single low-friction CTA pattern inside metadata and pinned comment. Default question_tease remains the control until enough engaged views accumulate.
cta_pattern.promotion_rule: promote only with explicit hypothesis, >=8 samples per variant and no guardrail regression

cta_style.hypothesis: End-of-Short call-to-action. Default subscribe_channel remains the control until enough engaged views accumulate.
cta_style.promotion_rule: promote only with explicit hypothesis, >=8 samples per variant and no guardrail regression

end_card_style.hypothesis: Final on-frame CTA treatment measured separately from spoken CTA. Default subscribe_clean remains the control until enough engaged views accumulate.
end_card_style.promotion_rule: promote only with explicit hypothesis, >=8 samples per variant and no guardrail regression

hook_style.hypothesis: First-sentence shape â€” the single biggest retention lever. Default outcome_first remains the control until enough engaged views accumulate.
hook_style.promotion_rule: promote only with explicit hypothesis, >=8 samples per variant and no guardrail regression

loop_style.hypothesis: Replay loop structure for the final beat. Default callback remains the control until enough engaged views accumulate.
loop_style.promotion_rule: promote only with explicit hypothesis, >=8 samples per variant and no guardrail regression

music_bed.hypothesis: Safe local-manifest music bed experiment; off is the production fallback. Default off remains the control until enough engaged views accumulate.
music_bed.promotion_rule: promote only with explicit hypothesis, >=8 samples per variant and no guardrail regression

narrator_voice.hypothesis: Small host-voice panel for measured narrator variety. Default aria remains the control until enough engaged views accumulate.

opening_visual_pattern.hypothesis: First visual beat that defends against the swipe. Default animal_closeup remains the control until enough engaged views accumulate.

script_tone.hypothesis: Voice-over register. Default opinionated remains the control until enough engaged views accumulate.

subtitle_density.hypothesis: Caption density tuned for mobile comprehension. Default low remains the control until enough engaged views accumulate.

thumbnail_style.hypothesis: Locked thumbnail format: real footage frame, large side cue, small Wild Brief brand. Default frame_first_side_caption remains the control until enough engaged views accumulate.
thumbnail_style.promotion_rule: promote only with explicit hypothesis, >=8 samples per variant and no guardrail regression

title_shape.hypothesis: Title shape used for measured packaging learning. Default curiosity_gap remains the control until enough engaged views accumulate.
title_shape.promotion_rule: promote only with explicit hypothesis, >=8 samples per variant and no guardrail regression
